MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GARY FRIEDMAN, M.D.'S "DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND."
APPEARANCE: Theresa A. Wolanin, Esq. of Law Offices of Steven D. Hillyard 334-6880 specially appearing for deft & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - demurrer to second cause of action sustained with leave to amend complaint for the sole purpose of alleging res ipsa loquitur allegations in the first cause of action. Order signed in open court. (301/HEK/CK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
